title: elaphoglossum zebrinum
intro: Elaphoglossum zebrinum, also known as the zebra fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its distinctive zebra-like striped foliage. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Elaphoglossum zebrinum has been employed for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Elaphoglossum zebrinum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
